member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Api.JellyseerrIntegrationController
member.summary: API endpoints for the JellySeerr Integration plugin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Api.JellyseerrIntegrationController.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Net.IAuthorizationContext,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.JellyseerrService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Api.JellyseerrIntegrationController.GetEmailPromptStatus
member.summary: Returns whether the currently authenticated Jellyfin user should be prompted to add their email to their JellySeerr account.
member.returns: Email prompt status for the current user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Api.JellyseerrIntegrationController.GetScript
member.summary: Serves the plugin client-side JavaScript file.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.EmailPromptStatusDto
member.summary: Response returned to the Jellyfin web client for the email prompt status check.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.EmailPromptStatusDto.NeedsEmail
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user should be prompted to add their email.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.EmailPromptStatusDto.SettingsUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to link to in the prompt banner.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.JellyseerrUser
member.summary: JellySeerr user object returned by the /api/v1/users endpoint.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.JellyseerrUser.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the JellySeerr internal user ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.JellyseerrUser.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the account email. Empty string when not set.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.JellyseerrUser.JellyfinUsername
member.summary: Gets or sets the linked Jellyfin username.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.JellyseerrUsersResponse
member.summary: Paginated response from GET /api/v1/users.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Models.JellyseerrUsersResponse.Results
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of users on this page.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Plugin
member.summary: The JellySeerr Integration plugin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the current plugin instance.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableEmailPrompt
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the email prompt feature is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.JellyseerrUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the JellySeerr base URL (no trailing slash), e.g. http://jellyseerr:5055.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.JellyseerrApiKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the JellySeerr admin API key (from JellySeerr Settings → General).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.CustomFormUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional override URL shown in the banner instead of the direct JellySeerr link. Supports the {username} placeholder to include the user's Jellyfin username.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers plugin services with the dependency injection container.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.JellyseerrService
member.summary: Handles communication with the JellySeerr API.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.JellyseerrService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.JellyseerrService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.JellyseerrService.GetUserEmailStatusAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the given Jellyfin user has set their email in JellySeerr. Returns NeedsEmail=false (no banner) if the user cannot be found in JellySeerr or on any error.
member.param: The Jellyfin username to look up.
member.returns: Email prompt status for this user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.JellyseerrService.InvalidateCache(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the cached status for a user, forcing a fresh lookup on the next request.
member.param: The Jellyfin username whose cache entry to remove.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.ScriptInjectorService
member.summary: Injects the plugin client script into Jellyfin's index.html at server startup.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.ScriptInjectorService.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyseerrIntegration.Services.ScriptInjectorService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
